changes: Nav bar inner div: added max-md:flex-wrap (class is now 'flex items-stretch justify-between max-md:flex-wrap')
Right column div: added max-md:w-full max-md:order-last (class is now 'flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0 max-md:w-full max-md:order-last')
Nav bar inner div: added max-md:flex-wrap (className is now 'flex items-stretch justify-between max-md:flex-wrap')
Right column div: added max-md:w-full max-md:order-last (className is now 'flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0 max-md:w-full max-md:order-last')

fixesApplied.description: Added max-md:flex-wrap to the nav bar inner div so the right column (containing the nav) can wrap to a new row on mobile, giving the nav full-width space when the mobile menu opens.

Added max-md:w-full max-md:order-last to the right column div so it takes full width when wrapped to the second row on mobile, and order-last ensures it always renders after the logo and hamburger button on that first row.

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs — unrelated to Header block

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP are in sync. Pre-existing depth-1 structure warning is expected and unchanged.
